# Curriculum baseline — 2026-06-16

Snapshot of the remote D1 `code-coach-db` (id `86734356-1259-4dc8-88e8-f8c116501477`) at the start of the timu.MD refactor. Captured by `wrangler d1 export code-coach-db --remote --no-schema --output tests/fixtures/baseline-2026-06-16.sql`.

## Counts

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Total questions in export | 1182 |
| Published questions (`is_published = 1`) | 1054 |
| Unpublished questions | 128 |
| Lessons | 148 |
| Courses | 24 (1 unpublished exam bank) |
| Distinct prompts across published | 462 |
| Duplication factor | ~2.3× |

## Test results

`npx vitest run tests/curriculumDuplication.test.ts`:

- **Sanity (published size > 0)**: PASS — 1054 published.
- **No within-lesson prompt dup**: PASS — within a single lesson all prompts are unique (the seed-data factories produce 7 pack questions + 1 lesson-specific 8th, all distinct).
- **No cross-lesson prompt dup**: **FAIL** — 77 distinct prompts appear in 2+ lessons, totaling 669 affected rows. Top offenders:
  - `"remix/app/routes/api.nemesis.ts 对非 POST 请求应如何处理？"` → 34 lessons
  - `"Nemesis 在 callNemesisModel 之前必须完成哪些检查？（多选）"` → 34 lessons
  - `"排列 api.nemesis action 中关键步骤的正确顺序："` → 34 lessons
  - `"补全未登录用户调用 Nemesis 时的返回片段："` → 34 lessons
  - `"以下伪代码把 callNemesisModel 放在 checkNemesisRateLimit 之前，问题？"` → 34 lessons
  - `"未登录 POST /api/nemesis 时，请求走向："` → 34 lessons
  - `"AI 生成的聊天 API 直接 callNemesisModel，无登录与限流。是否可上线？"` → 34 lessons
  - `"entry.server 在渲染前注入 Cloudflare 环境："` → 14 lessons
  - `"root loader 为何在无 auth cookie 时不调用 getSessionCached？"` → 13 lessons
  - `"Nemesis 聊天需要满足哪些条件？（多选）"` → 13 lessons
- **Every lesson has 22–54 questions**: **FAIL** — 133 lessons have only 8 questions. Zero lessons exceed 54. To pass this test, every lesson must reach timu.MD's 22–30 (or 36–54 for Nemesis) range.

## Root cause (confirmed)

`app/lib/server/learn/seed-data/units/lessonQuestions.ts` collapses 120 lessons into 8 topic buckets via regex-based `resolveTopic`, and 4 hard-coded pack functions return the same 7 static question objects for every lesson in a bucket. `seed.server.ts:97-104` does straight `INSERT` with no dedup. No test detected this before — `tests/projectSeedData.test.ts:30` only asserts `>= 8` questions per lesson.

## What this baseline must show after the refactor

After Phase 5/6, re-running the same export and tests must show:

| Metric | Before | After (target) |
|---|---|---|
| Cross-lesson prompt dup count | 77 prompts / 669 rows | 0 / 0 |
| Lessons with < 22 questions | 133 | 0 |
| Lessons with > 54 questions | 0 | 0 |
| Published total | 1054 | ~3000 (1054 unique × ~3 lessons) |
